title: Where to Purchase Jupiter (JUP): Full Guide
content:
## Why Purchase Jupiter?
Jupiter (JUP) is a vital component of the [Solana](/solana) ecosystem, serving as a primary tool for liquidity aggregation. As the project integrates more advanced DeFi features, interest in the governance token has persisted. Market participants monitor JUP due to its strong narrative and its role in routing trades across platforms like [Raydium](/raydium).

| Metric | Details |

## Top Exchange Options
JUP is primarily available on major centralized exchanges that support [Solana](/solana)-based assets and on decentralized platforms. Always verify the ticker symbol and the contract address before executing any trade to avoid interacting with fraudulent pools.

## Purchase Tutorial
To acquire JUP, you must first deposit fiat currency into a supported exchange, convert it into SOL, and then use that SOL to swap for JUP on the Jupiter platform or a connected DEX. Ensure you have a Solana-compatible wallet like Phantom to manage your assets outside of the exchange interface.

## Securing Your Tokens
While exchange storage is convenient, transferring your assets to a hardware wallet provides a higher level of security by keeping your private keys offline. Never share your seed phrase with anyone and use hardware devices for long-term holdings.

## Important Risks
With a TokenRadar Risk Score of 8, users must be aware that JUP is a high-risk asset. Market volatility is significant, and the asset has seen a yearly decline of -70.75%. Only allocate capital that you are prepared to lose, and stay updated on the latest protocol security audits.

## FAQ
- Is JUP available on all exchanges? No, JUP is primarily listed on platforms supporting the Solana network.
- Do I need SOL to buy JUP? Yes, since JUP is a Solana-native token, you will need SOL for transaction [gas](/gas) fees.
- Where can I find the official token address? Always use the link provided on the official website or verified block explorers.
